scope: Add IntegratedSmpNetworkFaultRecord as first-class integrated scenario evidence
Tie completed network driver cleanup to SMP stress, remote preempt, and cleanup quiescence evidence
Require exact generations for every referenced object and network cleanup effect count
Emit IntegratedSmpNetworkFaultRecorded event and stable osctl ViewV1 JSON
Expose historical graph edges without creating live ownership or adapter-internal semantic truth
Publish target_executor semantic package roots and count validation for X1 evidence
no_goals: real virtio-net, smoltcp, DMA, MMIO, or IRQ execution

implemented_contract_clauses.clause: X1 network driver fault under SMP
all integrated scenario references carry kind/id/generation
integrated scenario uses Historical graph edges for evidence attribution
packet-device authority closure is represented by revoked semantic capability evidence
osctl exposes stable ViewV1 JSON and contract validation output

findings_fixed: osctl command and inspect dispatch expose integrated-smp-network-fault JSON
contract graph resolves X1 evidence through exact network cleanup, packet device, adapter, backend, IO cleanup, remote-preempt, quiescence, and stress-run generations
target_executor writes X1 roots/counts into the semantic package so root validation covers the new evidence
history graph emits Historical edges only for integrated network fault attribution
bad_smells_checked: No real network driver fault execution is claimed by the integrated record
No smoltcp or virtio internal state became semantic truth
No substrate mapping is treated as semantic authority
No third-party dependency was introduced in semantic_core
osctl emits stable ViewV1 JSON rather than internal Rust structs
residual_notes: X2 owns disk pending IO fault under preemption
Future real SMP/network runtime must replace semantic evidence sources without changing the X1 object identity contract
driver_store is exposed as semantic generation metadata, not a target Store live edge

validation_commands.command: cargo check -p semantic_core -p artifact_manifest -p contract_core -p target_executor -p osctl

residual_gaps: X2 owns disk pending IO fault under preemption
X3 owns SIMD task migration across harts
Real SMP runtime must later provide substrate-backed IPI and network fault evidence
